title: F_FlangeOffset Statement
syntax:
F_FlangeOffset

F_FlangeOffset, x_rValue, y_rValue, z_rValue, u_rValue, v_rValue, w_rValue
parameters:
x_rValue,
		 ...	A
		 numerical value or formula defining the new value
description:
This sets or returns the position and attitude of the center of the force sensor base in the Tool 0 coordinate system.

This is used when the positional relationship between Tool 0 and the force sensor has changed. Since the sensor reading cannot be acquired in the assumed coordinate system if a mistake is made in the setting operation, set it accurately and use the force function.
see_also:
This sets or returns the force sensor position and attitude in the Tool 0 (TCP0, J6 flange) coordinate system.

F_GravityDirection Statement
